subject: Son Gohan in Super Saiyan form with golden spiky hair, in a dramatic powered-up stance with golden energy aura blazing
description: A male figure with golden spiky hair stands in a powered-up combat stance. The golden Super Saiyan hair is clearly visible and prominent. He wears a dark outfit — appears to be a dark gi or jacket. Golden energy blazes around the figure as an aura, with the background washed in warm gold and yellow light. A large dark object is visible in the lower portion of the frame — possibly a boulder, ground element, or knocked-away object — adding scale and impact to the composition. The pose is upright and powerful rather than mid-attack.
foreground: Golden-haired Super Saiyan in dark outfit, powerful upright stance, golden aura blazing
background: Golden energy wash, warm light, ground element visible
